= Scotch Gambit Accepted =

=== 7. Bxd5!! ===
White plays the astounding Bxd5!! which seems to blunder a bishop. However, after Qxd5, Nc3! takes advantage of the two heavy piece pins and wins back the piece with a fork.

The only (natural) followup is [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bc4/3...Nf6/4. d4/4...exd4/5. O-O/5...Nxe4/6. Re1/6...d5/7. Bxd5/7...Qxd5|7...Qxd5]].
